title: Flour Power
description: Adds the ability to craft wheat into flour and then smelt flour into bread.
body:
**I started uploading here as of 1.16.x and will upload all future versions here, too!**

Flour Power is a simple, lightweight mod which allows the crafting of flour from wheat, and then the ability to smelt the flour into bread.

The mod also contains "Flour Paste" which can be crafted and used as a replacement for slimeballs.

Flour is also tagged as 'forge:flour' for integration.

 

Translations are greatly appreciated and come with credit on this page and within the mod. If you would like to translate a mod or see if any current translations need updates, you can access the localisation repository [here](https://github.com/Anteater46/ModTranslations)!

**Current Translations:**

French by AlasDiablo

Dutch by R056

Portuguese by F35H

German by EinKlumpenZucker

Russian by ZettaSword

 


Use it in modpacks if you want, just give me (Anteater46) credit and don't charge for it :) 
 

Credit to dsbookbug for the logo.
